info.name: Maham Expo - Admin
info.description:
Admin management collection for Maham Expo API.

All management routes use `/v1/manage/` prefix.
Permission-based access control — requires admin role with appropriate permissions.

**Headers (auto-added via pre-request):**
- Accept: application/json
- Accept-Language: {{language}}
- X-Platform: {{platform}}

request.description:
Login as Admin.

**Required:** identifier, password
**Optional:** service_token, service_name

Saves `admin_token` and `auth_token` to environment.

List all events with filtering and pagination.

**Permission:** events.view

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Tech Expo 2025",
    "name_ar": "معرض التقنية 2025",
    "description": "Annual technology exhibition",
    "description_ar": "معرض التقنية السنوي",
    "city_id": "{{city_id}}",
    "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
    "start_date": "2025-06-01",
    "end_date": "2025-06-05",
    "venue": "Riyadh Exhibition Center",
    "venue_ar": "مركز الرياض للمعارض",
    "address": "King Fahd Road",
    "address_ar": "طريق الملك فهد",
    "latitude": 24.7136,
    "longitude": 46.6753,
    "status": "draft",
    "featured": false,
    "rental_duration": "daily"
}

request.description:
Create a new event.

**Permission:** events.create

**Required:** name, name_ar, city_id, category_id, start_date, end_date
**Optional:** description, description_ar, venue, venue_ar, address, address_ar, latitude, longitude, status, featured, rental_duration, image

Update an event. All fields optional.

**Permission:** events.update

List sections for an event.

**Permission:** sections.view

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Hall A",
    "name_ar": "القاعة أ",
    "description": "Main exhibition hall",
    "description_ar": "قاعة المعرض الرئيسية",
    "floor_number": 1,
    "map_coordinates": null
}

request.description:
Create a section.

**Permission:** sections.create

**Required:** name, name_ar
**Optional:** description, description_ar, floor_number, map_coordinates

List spaces for an event.

**Permission:** spaces.view

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Booth A-101",
    "name_ar": "جناح أ-101",
    "description": "Premium corner booth",
    "description_ar": "جناح زاوية مميز",
    "section_id": "{{section_id}}",
    "location_code": "A-101",
    "area_sqm": 25,
    "price_per_day": 500,
    "price_total": 2500,
    "payment_system": "full",
    "rental_duration": "daily",
    "floor_number": 1,
    "status": "available",
    "services": []
}

request.description:
Create a space.

**Permission:** spaces.create

**Required:** name, name_ar, section_id, location_code, area_sqm
**Optional:** description, description_ar, price_per_day, price_total, payment_system, rental_duration, floor_number, status, services

Create a service.

**Permission:** expo-services.create

**Required:** name, name_ar
**Optional:** description, description_ar, icon, is_active

Create a category.

**Permission:** categories.create

**Required:** name, name_ar
**Optional:** description, description_ar, icon, is_active

Create a city.

**Permission:** cities.create

**Required:** name, name_ar
**Optional:** country, country_ar, is_active

Update settings (bulk).

**Permission:** settings.update

**Required:** settings (array of {key, value})

Create a banner.

**Permission:** banners.create

**Required:** title, title_ar, image, position
**Optional:** link_url, sort_order, is_active, starts_at, ends_at

body.raw:
{ "title": "About Us", "title_ar": "من نحن", "slug": "about-us", "content": "

About our platform

", "content_ar": "

عن منصتنا

", "is_published": true }

request.description:
Create a page.

**Permission:** pages.create

**Required:** title, title_ar, slug, content, content_ar
**Optional:** is_published

body.raw:
{
    "question": "How to register?",
    "question_ar": "كيف أسجل؟",
    "answer": "Click on the register button",
    "answer_ar": "اضغط على زر التسجيل",
    "category": "general",
    "sort_order": 1,
    "is_published": true
}

request.description:
Create a FAQ.

**Permission:** faqs.create

**Required:** question, question_ar, answer, answer_ar
**Optional:** category, sort_order, is_published

Create an invoice.

**Permission:** invoices.create

**Required:** user_id, items, due_date
**Optional:** notes

Mark paid.

**Permission:** invoices.mark-paid

**Optional:** payment_method, payment_reference, paid_at

Record payment.

**Permission:** rental-requests.record-payment

**Required:** amount, payment_method
**Optional:** payment_reference, notes

Create contract.

**Permission:** rental-contracts.create

**Required:** rental_request_id
**Optional:** terms, terms_ar, start_date, end_date

Create sponsor.

**Permission:** sponsors.create

**Required:** event_id, user_id, package_id, company_name
**Optional:** company_name_ar, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, status

Create package.

**Permission:** sponsor-packages.create

**Required:** name, name_ar, price
**Optional:** description, description_ar, max_sponsors, benefits, is_active

Create contract.

**Permission:** sponsor-contracts.create

**Required:** sponsor_id, package_id, total_amount
**Optional:** start_date, end_date, terms, terms_ar

Create payment.

**Permission:** sponsor-payments.create

**Required:** sponsor_contract_id, amount
**Optional:** payment_method, due_date, notes

Create benefit.

**Permission:** sponsor-benefits.create

**Required:** sponsor_contract_id, name, name_ar
**Optional:** description, description_ar, quantity, status
